mapper.sql: id, job_id, job_name, job_group, class_name, method_name, method_params, cron_expression, status, execute_time, error_msg, fire_time, TO_CHAR(create_time, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS createTime
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_job_log_info WHERE id = #{id} AND delete_flag = 0
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sys_job_log_info WHERE create_time < NOW() - (#{days} || ' days')::INTERVAL
